passive.name: Pit Grit
passive.description: Sett's basic attacks alternate between left and right punch. Right punch is slightly stronger and faster. Sett also hates losing, gaining additional health regeneration based off of his missing health.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate - Heart of the Half-Beast:}} {{ci|Sett}} {{sti|health regeneration|regenerates}} additional health based on {{as|his '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Innate - Heavy Hands:}} '''Sett's''' basic attacks alternate between his {{as|Left Punch|armor}} and a {{as|Right Punch|buzzword3}}. His {{as|Right Punch|buzzword3}} attacks more quickly with {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}} and deals {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Heart of the Half-Beast:}} '''Sett''' {{sti|health regeneration|link=true|regenerates}}{{ft|an additional {{as|{{pp|0.15;0.5;1;2|1 to 16 for 4}} health}} per second for every {{sti|{{as|5% of his '''missing''' health}}}}.|up-to {{as|{{pp|0.15*19;0.5*19;1*19;2*19|1 to 16 for 4}} health}} per second (maximum reached at {{sti|{{as|95% '''missing''' health}}}}).}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - Heavy Hands:}} '''Sett's''' [[basic attack]]s alternate between his {{as|Left Punch|armor}} and a {{as|Right Punch|buzzword3}} {{tip|on-attack}}. '''Sett''' begins attacking with his {{as|Left Punch|armor}}, and will reset back to it after 2 seconds of not performing a {{as|Right Punch|buzzword3}}.
wiki_detail.description3: '''Sett's''' {{as|Right Punch|buzzword3}} is empowered to gain {{sti|range|50 '''bonus''' range}} (unless ''{{ai|Knuckle Down|Sett}}'' is active), attack at 8 times the {{as|Left Punch's|armor}} {{as|attack speed}}, and deal {{as|{{pp|5 to 90}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ 55% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.video:
|notes        = 
* The {{as|Right Punch|buzzword3}} does not grant {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}, rather its windup is sped up and fixed at {{ft|{{fd|12.5%}} of a {{as|Left Punch's|armor}} windup time.|800% of a {{as|Left Punch's|armor}} windup speed.}}
** The windup is still affected by {{tip|cripple|cripples}} and attack speed buffs that were not already active for the previous {{as|Left Punch's|armor}}.
* The bonus physical damage from the {{as|Right Punch|buzzword3}} benefits from {{stil|life steal}}.

Q.name: Knuckle Down
Q.description: Sett's next two attacks deal additional damage based off of the target's max health. Sett also gains Move Speed while moving towards enemy champions.
Q.tooltip:
Sett itches for a fight, gaining {{ msamount*100 }}% Move Speed towards enemy champions for {{ msduration }} seconds.

Additionally Sett's next two Attacks deal an additional {{ basedamage }} plus {{ maxhealthdamagecalc }} max Health physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sett}} empowers his next two basic attacks within a few seconds to gain {{sti|'''bonus''' range}} and deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} based on the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: He also briefly gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while moving toward enemy {{tip|champions}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sett''' empowers his next two basic attacks within 5 seconds to gain {{sti|50 '''bonus''' range}} and deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, capped at 400 '''total''' damage of each attack against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Bonus Physical Damage|{{ap|10 to 50}} {{as|(+ 1% {{as|(+ {{ap|1 to 3}}% per 100 AD)}} of target's '''maximum''' health)}}|Total Bonus Physical Damage|{{ap|10*2 to 50*2}} {{as|(+ 2% {{as|(+ {{ap|1*2 to 3*2}}% per 100 AD)}} of target's '''maximum''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: For {{fd|1.5}} seconds, '''Sett''' also gains {{sti|movement speed|{{as|30% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy {{tip|champions}} within 2000 units.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Knuckle Down {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Sett's''' basic attack timer. The empowered attacks are guaranteed to be a {{as|Left Punch|Armor}} followed by a {{as|Right Punch|buzzword3}}, resetting '''Sett's''' current {{ai|Pit Grit|Sett}} state (if applicable) and ignoring the usual time-out period for a follow-up {{as|Right Punch|buzzword3}}.''
wiki_detail.video:
|notes        = 
* The bonus movement speed buff is named ''Looking For a Fight''.
* ''Knuckle Down'' can be {{tip|dodged}}, {{tip|blocked}} or missed while '''Sett''' is {{tip|blind|blinded}}.

W.name: Haymaker
W.description: Sett passively stores damage he takes as Grit. On cast, Sett expends all stored Grit to gain a shield and punch an area, dealing true damage in the center and physical damage on the sides.
W.tooltip:
Passive: Sett stores {{ damagestored*100 }}% of damage taken as Grit, up to {{ maxgrit }}. Grit decays quickly {{ adrenalinestoragewindow }} seconds after the damage was taken.

Active: Sett consumes all Grit, gaining a {{ shieldconversion*100 }}% Grit consumed Shield decaying over {{ shieldmaxduration }} seconds. Sett then delivers a massive punch, dealing {{ damagecalc }} plus {{ damageconversion }} Grit consumed true damage to enemies in the center (max {{ f1 }} damage). Enemies not in the center instead take physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Sett}} stores ''Grit'' equal to damage taken, which gradually expires after a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sett''' converts his current ''Grit'' into a {{tip|shield}} that decays over a short time. He also unleashes a blast in a cone in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit based on his expended ''Grit''. Enemies hit in a center line are dealt {{as|true damage}} instead.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Sett''' stores 100% of {{tt|post-mitigation damage|Damage calculated after resistances and modifiers.}} taken as ''Grit'' on his resource bar, up to a cap of {{as|50% of his '''maximum''' health}}. Each instance of stored ''Grit'' decays in value by 30% every second after 4 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sett''' charges up a strike over the cast time. Additionally, he immediately consumes all of his stored ''Grit'' to grant himself a {{tip|shield}} at the start of the cast time that is equal to the expended ''Grit'' for 3 seconds, decaying in strength over the duration after {{fd|0.75}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: After the cast time, he unleashes a blast in a cone in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit; those hit in a center line are dealt {{ccs|{{sti|{{as|true damage}}}}|true}} instead.
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|725|Inner true damage rectangle reach, center-to-edge range}}
wiki_detail.width: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|60|Inner true damage rectangle width, center-to-edge range}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{pending for test}} Trapezoid effect hitbox geometry values, backwards range (true damage rectangle does NOT start at 0 distance from Sett; doesn't have as much reach backwards while still being edge range).
* The shield is granted at the start of the cast time and will decay afterwards.
** The buff for the shield is named ''Down But Not Out''.
* '''Sett''' does not store ''Grit'' from damage that was mitigated by {{tip|shield|shields}}.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* '''Sett''' will turn towards the target direction at the start of the cast time.
* '''Sett''' will glow when attaining 90% ''Grit''. Casting ''Haymaker'' at this amount has a different visual and audio effect.
[[File:90%_Grit_Sett.png|thumb|left|'''Sett''' will turn {{color|#FFDF00|'''golden'''}} ''(base skin)''.]]

E.name: Facebreaker
E.description: Sett pulls in all enemies on opposite sides of him, dealing damage and stunning them. If enemies were only on one side, they are slowed instead of stunned.
E.tooltip: Sett smashes enemies on either side of him into each other, dealing {{ damagecalc }} physical damage and Slowing them by {{ slowamount*100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} seconds. If Sett grabbed at least one enemy on each side, all enemies are Stunned for {{ stunduration }} second.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sett}} {{tip|airborne|pulls in}} enemies along the target direction from both sides of himself, dealing {{as|physical damage}} and briefly {{tip|slow|slowing}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If ''Facebreaker'' affects at least one enemy on each side, all enemies are also briefly {{tip|stun|stunned}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sett''' {{tip|airborne|pulls in}} enemies at his front and back along the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 70% for {{fd|0.5}} seconds. ''Facebreaker'' deals {{as|100 '''bonus''' physical damage}} to {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|50 to 130}} {{as|(+ 60% AD)}}}}
{{st|Monster Physical Damage|{{ap|50+100 to 130+100}} {{as|(+ 60% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: If ''Facebreaker'' affects at least one enemy on each side, all enemies are {{tip|stun|stunned}} for 1 second upon landing.
wiki_detail.description3: If no enemies are hit, '''''Sett''' is unable to move or attack for {{fd|0.25}} seconds after Facebreaker's cast time.''
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|450|In front and behind of Sett, center-to-edge range}}

R.name: The Show Stopper
R.description: Sett carries an enemy champion through the air and slams them into the ground, dealing damage and slowing all enemies near where they land.
R.tooltip: Sett grabs an enemy champion and Suppresses them as he carries them forward, then slams them into the ground, dealing {{ damagecalc }} plus {{ maxhealthdamage*100 }}% of the grabbed enemy's bonus Health physical damage to surrounding enemies and Slowing them by {{ slowamount*100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} second. Enemies take less damage the further they are from where Sett lands.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sett}} {{tip|suppression|carries}} the target enemy {{tip|champion}} and {{tip|dash|dashes}} through the air with {{tip|displacement immunity}}, then slams them into the ground to deal {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies based on the {{as|target's '''bonus''' health}}. Enemies hit are also briefly {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|displacement immunity|nolink=true}}:}} The dash cannot be deterred by {{tip|crowd control}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sett''' {{tip|suppression|suppresses}} and {{tip|true sight|reveals}} the target enemy {{tip|champion}} while {{tip|dash|dashing}} with {{tip|displacement immunity}} to their location and {{tip|attach|attaching}} them to himself upon arrival. He leaps another 600 units in the same direction to slam the target into the ground, creating a massive shockwave and quickly {{tip|dash|sliding}} forward 250 units beyond the impact.
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies within {{tt|the epicenter|125 unit radius around the target's landing location, but not the true center of the area of effect}} take {{ccs|{{as|physical damage}}|physical}}, and other enemies hit by the shockwave take {{as|physical damage}} that is reduced by up to 75% based on proximity. All targets hit are {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 99% for 1 second.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|200 to 400}} {{as|(+ 120% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|40 to 60}}% of primary target's '''bonus''' health)}}|Reduced Damage|{{ap|200*0.25 to 400*0.25}} {{as|(+ 30% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|40*0.25 to 60*0.25}}% of primary target's '''bonus''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''The dash will end and create the impact prematurely upon encountering terrain that cannot be dashed through, whether by distance or invalid space.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|600|From Sett's own final landing destination (may be a bug)}}
